THING_MODEL.SPECIFICATIONS:
Humidifier
A Humidifier. 

Features:
  • Registration Server Compatible
  • Off
  • On
  • Increases Humdity
Usage:
  • N/A
Direct Control:
  • ALT-click to interact 
Local Control:
  • Connect device to MCU/SBC/Thing. Use the "customWrite"  or digitalWrite API per Data Specifications
Remote Control:
  • Connect device to Registration Server using Config Tab
Data Specifications:
  • Input Slot: D0
  • Message Format: [state]
    state: 0 = off, 1 = on
Example:
  • N/A
